code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()

  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true

  while i < n
    if i % 2 == 0
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      if first
        result = tok
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{tok}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
end
